module.description: Wi-Fi network name and password for the guest booklet
host.section.network.help: Name and password guests see in the booklet.
host.ssid.label: Network name (SSID)
host.password.label: Password
host.password.placeholder: Leave blank to keep the current password
host.section.hint.help: Optional — e.g. 5 GHz band, sticker on the router…
host.hint.label: Hint for guests
host.hint.placeholder: e.g. Select the 5 GHz network if available
host.section.reveal.help: The SSID stays visible; only the password follows this schedule.
host.reveal.always.desc: Password visible as soon as the booklet opens.
host.reveal.dayBefore16h.desc: Visible the day before at 4 pm, property time.
host.reveal.atCheckin.desc: Visible only from the arrival time.
host.main.help: SSID and password are stored for this module and synced to the property profile.
guest.security.title: Guest network only
guest.security.message: Use this Wi-Fi for your stay. Do not share the password outside your travel group.
guest.empty.title: Wi-Fi not configured
guest.empty.description: Add network details from the host dashboard
guest.error.title: Wi-Fi temporarily unavailable
guest.error.description: Network details could not be loaded
module.status.incomplete.title: Incomplete configuration
module.status.incomplete.description: Finish Wi-Fi setup in the host dashboard
module.status.incomplete.hint: SSID or password missing — open Modules → Guest Wi-Fi
module.status.inactive.title: Guest Wi-Fi module disabled
module.status.inactive.description: This module is not active on this property
reveal.locked.generic: The password will be available closer to check-in.
